task_text: Pick up the red cube from the table. The red cube is at position [0.3, 0.0, 0.425] on the table surface at z=0.4125. Approach from above, open the gripper, lower to the cube, close the gripper to grasp, then lift the cube at least 0.1m above the table.

params.description: red_cube must be lifted at least 0.1m above table surface (0.4125 + 0.1 = 0.5125)

reward_hint: Sparse reward: 1.0 when red_cube height exceeds 0.525m, 0.0 otherwise.
